title: Schedule
description: An OS-crontab schedule for a reconcile operation, recorded in settings.yaml.

name.description: The reconcile operation this schedule runs.

creationTimestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron when the document was created; never hand-edited.

lastUpdatedTimestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron on the document's most recent write; never hand-edited.

cron.description: The cron expression registered in the OS crontab.
